zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Inge於大約1299年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親Sir William Inge33歲，母親Margery Grapinel34歲。她於大約1313年與Eudes la Zouche在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年1月30日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾雷德布享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Inge于大约1299年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，她的父亲Sir William Inge33岁，母亲Margery Grapinel34岁。她于大约1313年与Eudes la Zouche在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年1月30日在英国英格兰賀特福爾雷德布享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Inge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the district of Ing (Essex), now represented by the placenames Ingrave, Ingatestone, Fryerning, Margaretting, and Mountnessing, as well as earlier alternative names of Fouchers (in East Hornden) and Buttsbury. The placename means ‘people of the district’, from Old English gē ‘district, region’ + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas.

English: from Middle English Inge, itself either from the Old Norse female personal name Inga (a pet form of such names as Ingi(v)aldr), or from the Scandinavian male personal name Inge (a pet form of such names as Ingiríthr), or the Anglo-Saxon form of such a name, Inga. Unless there are other indications of gender, the two sources cannot be distinguished.
German: probably from the ancient Germanic female personal name Inga.

variants.name: Ing
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire and Middlesex): variant of   Inge  .
Chinese: alternative Cantonese form of the surnames 應, 嬴, and 英, see   Ying   1-3.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Inge was born about 1299, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Inge, was 33 and her mother, Margery Grapinel, was 34. She married Eudes la Zouche about 1313, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 30 January 1360, in Redbourn, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Inge est née environ 1299, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Inge, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Grapinel, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes la Zouche environ 1313, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1360, à Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Inge um 1299 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Inge 33 und ihre Mutter Margery Grapinel 34. Sie hat um 1313 in England, United Kingdom Eudes la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1360 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Redbourn, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Inge è nata il circa 1299 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Inge, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margery Grapinel, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Eudes la Zouche circa 1313, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 gennaio 1360, nel Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ingeが約1299年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Sir William Ingeは33歳，母Margery Grapinelは34歳であった。約1313年にイギリスイギリスでEudes la Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年1月30日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアレドボウルンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Inge(이)가 대략 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Inge(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Grapinel(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1313년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Eudes la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 레드보우른에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Inge nasceu aproximadamente 1299, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Inge, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Grapinel, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes la Zouche aproximadamente 1313, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1360, em Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Inge родилась около 1299 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Inge было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Grapinel, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes la Zouche около 1313 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1360 г. в местности редбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Inge nació aproximadamente 1299, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Inge, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Grapinel, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eudes la Zouche aproximadamente 1313, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de enero de 1360, en Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
